是一个功能类优先的 CSS 框架，它提供了低级实用类，让你能够快速构建自定义设计。\n\n## 代码示例\n\n```html\n<div class=\"flex items-center justify-center min-h-screen bg-gray-100\">\n  <div class=\"p-6 bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg\">\n    <h1 class=\"text-2xl font-bold text-gray-800\">Hello Tailwind!</h1>\n  </div>\n</div>\n```\n\n## 总结\n\nTailwind CSS 极大地提高了开发效率，是现代前端开发的利器。"}]}]}],"$L7"]}]],["$L8","$L9"],"$La"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"J0klThngkIncqV3dNMY_R"}
